unmapped.human_action: Add Bachem (SIX: BCHN) and PolyPeptide Group (SIX: POLN) to equity watchlist as peptide-API CDMO proxies. Monitor CDMO quarterly filings for order-book commentary and capacity utilization guidance. Do not initiate LLY or NVO long positions at current scanner asymmetry levels — the originator options are taxed. Watch FDA drug-shortage list for semaglutide and tirzepatide status as the binary compounding-channel catalyst.
unmapped.machine_action: Poll Bachem and PolyPeptide Group IR feeds for capacity utilization and order-book guidance revisions. Monitor FDA Drug Shortage Database for semaglutide and tirzepatide status changes. Flag any originator-pharma announcement of vertical integration into peptide API manufacturing.
unmapped.methodology_footer: Sector: peptides (diversity-adjusted score 15.525 after 8.0 recency penalty). Format pivoted from yesterday's narrative_loud_trade_bad (originator level, 2026-05-30) to quiet_setup (manufacturing layer) to avoid repeating the same thesis angle. Decision packet dp_peptide_manufacturing_watchlist verdict: watchlist_candidate. Scanner data from 2026-04-28; corpus claims dated 2026-05-15.
unmapped.position_conflict_disclosure: No current book exposure in peptides sector. Open book positions are in cicadas theme (FXA put spreads); no conflict with this thesis.
unmapped.uncertainty: CDMO names are primarily Swiss-listed (SIX); scanner has no qualifying options contracts for either Bachem or PolyPeptide Group, limiting the current expression to equity monitoring only. The picks-and-shovels thesis is contingent on CDMOs remaining independent capacity providers rather than becoming vertically integrated into originator supply chains. Telehealth compounded-volume figures rely on company IR rather than independent prescription data.

original_issue.thesis: Peptide API manufacturing capacity is the structural constraint on GLP-1 supply — observable in primary CDMO investor filings at 0.80 corpus confidence — while originator names trade at peak-hype convergence and the manufacturing layer sits entirely outside option flow. The picks-and-shovels CDMO expression carries lower franchise-headline risk and has not been priced by the narrative wave that has taxed LLY and NVO.
original_issue.uncertainty: CDMO names are primarily Swiss-listed (SIX); scanner has no qualifying options contracts for either Bachem or PolyPeptide Group, limiting the current expression to equity monitoring only. The picks-and-shovels thesis is contingent on CDMOs remaining independent capacity providers rather than becoming vertically integrated into originator supply chains. Telehealth compounded-volume figures rely on company IR rather than independent prescription data.
